[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010000 2
1 1110100 4
2 0010011 3
3 0001100 2
4 0001000 1
5 1111001 5
6 1101100 4
7 1111100 5

12 21 1010000 2 match 0
